# Dramatics NYC

> Dramatics NYC is a hair salon chain with 5 locations in Manhattan, New York City, operating since 1984. Services: Cutting & Styling, Hair Coloring, and Hair Treatments. DNYC hair care products are made of up to 96% natural ingredients, paraben and sulfate free, and cruelty-free.

## Services & Prices
- Full price list: https://www.dramaticsnyc.com/services (all prices determined by hair length and texture)
- Cutting & Styling: Blow Dry $45–$65, Shampoo & Cut (only) $42 (first available stylist, no booking needed), Shampoo Cut & Style $65–$85, Updos $60–$120
- Hair Coloring: Single Process $80–$90 (no PPD, no PTD), Color Gloss $60–$70, Partial Highlights $90–$150, Full Highlights $150–$300, Double Process $100–$250, Balayage $175–$300
- Hair Treatments: Conditioning $25–$45, Dramaplex $25–$50, Botox $80–$150, Keratin $150–$350 (formaldehyde-free $350), Relaxer $150–$250, Volumizing $150–$250
- Work guaranteed for 7 days. MasterCard, Visa, and American Express accepted.

## Booking
- Book online: https://www.dramaticsnyc.com/book
- Every location also has its own online booking page and accepts phone bookings.

## Locations
- Dramatics NYC 120 E. 34th St. (Murray Hill), New York, NY 10016 — +1 (212) 686-8430 — Mon–Sat 9am–7pm, closed Sunday — https://www.dramaticsnyc.com/locations/34th-street-salon
- Dramatics NYC 1488 3rd Ave. (Upper East Side), New York, NY 10028 — +1 (212) 535-0073 — Mon–Sat 9am–7pm, Sun 9am–6pm — https://www.dramaticsnyc.com/locations/3rd-avenue-salon
- Dramatics NYC 352 W. 57th St. (Parc Vendome Condominiums), New York, NY 10019 — +1 (212) 586-1035 — Mon–Sat 9am–7pm, Sun 9am–6pm — https://www.dramaticsnyc.com/locations/57th-street-salon
- Dramatics NYC 2146 Broadway at 75th St. (Upper West Side), New York, NY 10023 — +1 (212) 496-6430 — Mon–Sat 9am–7pm, Sun 9am–6pm — https://www.dramaticsnyc.com/locations/dramatics-nyc-2146-broadway-hair-salon
- Dramatics NYC 2468 Broadway at 91st St. (Upper West Side), New York, NY 10025 — +1 (212) 595-2830 — Mon–Sat 9am–7pm, Sun 9am–6pm — https://www.dramaticsnyc.com/locations/2468-broadway-salon

## Shop
- Shop DNYC professional hair products online: https://www.dramaticsnyc.com/shop
- Shampoos, conditioners, treatments, and styling products made of up to 96% natural ingredients, paraben and sulfate free.
- Products and gift cards are also available at every salon location.
- Gift cards fit any budget, redeemable at your preferred DNYC salon, good for up to one year.

## Social
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/dramaticsnycsalons
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/DramaticsNYC
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/user/DramaticsNYCvideos
